title: geranium vagans subsp. vagans
intro: Geranium vagans subsp. vagans is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Geranium, commonly known as the St. Croix Island geranium. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Geranium vagans subsp. vagans include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a popular choice for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
